alert_data.rule_description: sshd: Attempt to login using a non-existent user

investigation_notes: External IP (203.0.113.50). 47 failed attempts in 5 minutes. 12 distinct usernames attempted - classic brute force pattern. No successful login. High risk - escalated immediately.
resolution: Escalated to analyst - potential brute force attack from external IP
analyst_notes: Confirmed brute force attack. IP blocked at firewall. No successful compromise detected.
